consistency.charge_management: Consistent. Starting charges (36), daily recharge (1d20), action cost per face, and charge loss mechanics are all detailed.
consistency.barrier_mechanics: Consistent. The barrier size (15 ft cube centered on user), duration (1 minute or until deactivated/charges depleted), and movement interaction are clearly defined.
consistency.table_data_vs_text: Consistent. The primary text describes the action economy and barrier properties, which are detailed explicitly in the 'Cube of Force Faces' table.

quality.clarity: High. The item's function, limitations, and costs are clearly itemized across multiple tables.
quality.completeness: High. Covers setup, activation, effect modes (via faces), duration, and countermeasures/damage sources.
quality.formatting_issues: The description relies on external formatting cues (like internal links for '#invisible', '#disintegrate', etc.) which are present but do not detract from the core data structure.

modes.effect: Blocks nonliving matter (walls/floors/ceilings can be excluded at discretion).
Blocks everything, except walls/floors/ceilings can be excluded at discretion.

barrier_properties.movement: Centered on and moves with the user
barrier_properties.duration: 1 minute (unless deactivated or charges run out)
